Name: FFoliageTypeObject
Description: A wrapper struct used to allow the use of either FoliageType assets or FoliageType blueprint classes

Variables.Name: FoliageTypeObject
Variables.Description: The foliage type that will be spawned by the procedural foliage simulation

Variables.Name: TypeInstance
Variables.Description: The actual instance of the foliage type that is used for spawning

Variables.Name: bIsAsset
Variables.Description: Whether this contains an asset object (as opposed to a BP class)
